commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 2 Chronicles 31:15 And under him were Eden, and Miniamin, and Jeshua, and Shemaiah, Amariah, and Shecaniah, in the cities of the priests, assisting him to give the portions to their brethren by divisions, to the old as well as to the young: At length. Septuagint, "were converted. "Hebrew, "ashamed, and sanctified themselves. "(Haydock) The ceremonies of purification for priests were longer, (chap. ) and the sacred ministers were ashamed to be outdone by the people. (Menochius).
